Ledgely — Small Business Systems

Clear answers, simple tools, and templates for small business owners. Step-by-step guides for EIN, ITIN, business setup, expense tracking, invoicing, and financial clarity.

Free Guides

What is an EIN. Who needs an EIN. EIN Application Preparation. What is an ITIN. ITIN Application Checklist. How to register a small business. How to track business expenses. What is a profit and loss statement. Cash flow basics for small businesses.

Free Tools

Monthly Profit Estimator. Business Expense Tracker. Cash Flow Planner. Invoice Generator.

Pro Systems

Business Starter System. Financial Control System. Client and Invoice Management System.
